blockingIssues.description: Scrutiny review found the completed feature commit `4e19c70` is test-only and does not contain the required production/runtime implementation for live CCXT ticker ingestion into the persisted exchange ticker path.

Full `bun test` currently fails on this branch with `TypeError: vi.hoisted is not a function` in `tests/exchange-surface-parity.test.ts`, plus cascading app and smoke-script failures, so milestone validators are not passing.

The repository does not define a `lint` script in `package.json`, so `bun run lint` fails even though `.factory/services.yaml` lists lint as `echo "no lint configured"`; the configured validator surfaces are inconsistent.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that scrutiny and manual validation may encounter an already-running validator on port 3102, and workers should either reuse that fast-profile server or stop it before starting a new validation server.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for feature exchange-derivatives-freshness cited worker session 3619e4c6-872b-4c22-b55c-834c07ecfe7d hitting EADDRINUSE on port 3102 while curls still succeeded against the existing validator; current AGENTS guidance mentions port bounds and :memory: usage but not this recurring reuse/stop pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten `runtime-provider-worker` so implementation-focused features cannot be completed with test-only commits; require reviewers or handoff checks to confirm production/runtime diffs when the feature scope calls for implementation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `exchange-live-ticker-ingestion` found commit `4e19c70` changed only `tests/exchange-fidelity.test.ts` while the feature description required runtime/service changes under `src/`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider softening the strict failing-test-first wording in `runtime-provider-worker` for small route/service fixes when nearby characterization already exists and the worker lands focused regression coverage in the same change.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `exchange-volume-accumulation-and-range` found the worker reasonably combined implementation and targeted regression coverage; current skill wording may be overly rigid for this class of change.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document in shared mission guidance when a previously-blocking Bun/Vitest incompatibility has already been resolved on the branch so later workers do not attribute unrelated fixes to their feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `search-trending-honesty-hardening` confirmed the `vi.mocked` issue had already been cleared in repo state before the feature work, but no shared mission guidance captures that fact.
